channel.title: UK Political Party Jobs
channel.description: Job listings for UK Political Parties roles, scraped by Pol-Intel.

item.title: Case Worker – Hannah Spencer MP
item.description: Provide additional casework capacity for the Manchester Gorton and Denton constituency team, managing a busy caseload and ensuring casework informs the MP's work and relationships.

item.title: Senior Case Worker – Hannah Spencer MP
item.description: Join the constituency team for Manchester Gorton and Denton, managing complex casework and ensuring constituents are fully represented in Parliament.

item.title: Constituency Office Manager – Hannah Spencer MP
item.description: Lead the constituency office for Manchester Gorton and Denton, ensuring the MP delivers the best possible support to constituents and the local community.

item.title: Senior Parliamentary Assistant – Hannah Spencer MP
item.description: Support Hannah Spencer to have maximum impact in Parliament. A fast-paced role for someone with outstanding organisational skills and excellent political judgement.

item.title: Social Media Officer
item.description: Support the Green Peers' social media presence by producing timely, engaging, and professional content that elevates the impact of speeches and appearances across digital channels.

item.title: Chief of Staff to the Leader of the Liberal Democrats
item.description: The Chief of Staff is the Leader's principal strategic adviser, responsible for ensuring the effective operation of the Leader's Office and supporting the Leader in delivering the Party's political, parliamentary, electoral and organisational aims.

item.title: Executive Assistant to the CEO/Governance Officer
item.description: Provide high-level executive support to the Chief Executive Officer and help deliver robust, transparent and well-managed governance across the Party's internal structures.

item.title: Data Protection Manager
item.description: Lead our approach to data protection and information governance, ensuring we meet legal obligations under UK GDPR, PECR, Data Protection Act 2018, and related legislation, while upholding our values.
